description: During a support interaction, a customer expresses interest in the loyalty program. The agent needs to enroll them.

expected_outcome.value: Agent has the correct customer profile open.

nodes.task_description: Explain the benefits of the loyalty program (e.g., points per dollar, exclusive offers).

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly communicates the value proposition of the program.

nodes.task_description: Enroll the customer in the loyalty program.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully updates the customer's account to enroll them in the program.
